u(T)end,function(X,c)local u=p(c)local G=function(G,b,E)return R(X,{G;b;E},c,u)end return G end,33790+-33790,function(X,c)local u=p(c)local G=function(G,b,E,N)return R(X,{G,b;E;N},c,u)end return G end,function(X,c)local u=p(c)local G=function(G,b,E,N,T)return R(X,{G,b;E,N;T},c,u)end return G end return(V(12405868-(-808230),{}))(u(T))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[c(670762+-646663)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
